case_title: ROBERT OINO VS. UNITED AIRLINES INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF OINO, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-17-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,389.92 FILED BY OINO, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
